zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana Belknap於大約1360年出生時，她的父親Robert Belknap32歲，母親Sybell Juliana de Dorset21歲。她於1387年1月與Robert de Avenel結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1417年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana Belknap于大约1360年出生时，她的父亲Robert Belknap32岁，母亲Sybell Juliana de Dorset21岁。她于1387年1月与Robert de Avenel结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1417年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Belknap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, the second element of which is most likely Middle English knappe ‘hilltop’. Compare Belnap .
History: Abraham Belknap (c. 1588–c. 1643) emigrated from Latton, Essex, England, to Lynn, MA, in the 1630s.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana Belknap was born about 1360, her father, Robert Belknap, was 32 and her mother, Sybell Juliana de Dorset, was 21. She married Robert de Avenel in January 1387. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died after 1417.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana Belknap est née environ 1360, son père, Robert Belknap, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Sybell Juliana de Dorset, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Avenel en janvier 1387. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1417.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana Belknap um 1360 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Belknap 32 und ihre Mutter Sybell Juliana de Dorset 21. Sie hat im Januar 1387 Robert de Avenel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1417.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Belknap è nata il circa 1360, sua padre, Robert Belknap, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Sybell Juliana de Dorset, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Avenel nel gennaio 1387. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1417.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana Belknapが約1360年に生まれた時，父Robert Belknapは32歳，母Sybell Juliana de Dorsetは21歳であった。1387年1月にRobert de Avenelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1417年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana Belknap(이)가 대략 1360년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Belknap(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybell Juliana de Dorset(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1387년 1월 Robert de Avenel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Belknap nasceu aproximadamente 1360, seu pai, Robert Belknap, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Sybell Juliana de Dorset, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Avenel em janeiro de 1387. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1417.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana Belknap родилась около 1360 г., её отцу по имени Robert Belknap было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sybell Juliana de Dorset, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Avenel январь 1387 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1417 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana Belknap nació aproximadamente 1360, su papá, Robert Belknap, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Sybell Juliana de Dorset, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Robert de Avenel en enero de 1387. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió después de 1417.
